archiveName.description: The name of the archive emitted by the archival task.

defaultProject.description: The default project to use when none is specified.

projects.description: The list of projects that can be built.

name.description: The project name. Must match the subdirectory and csproj file name exactly.

archiveSuffix.description: The suffix to append to the archive name emitted by the archival task.

outputSubdirectory.description: Used by path handling, primarily by the archival task. Specify if the files to be archived are in a subdirectory of the output.

substitutionTargets.description: A list of relative file paths to perform substitution on.

substitutions.description: Key-value pairs of substitution to be performed, in addition to the built-in ones.
